---
name: Steps
description: Execute exactly one provided step from a shared context file and mark it done in that same file.
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Complete only the single step I provide from the context file I share.

Rules:
1. Do exactly that step and nothing else.
2. Do not start, modify, or mention any other steps.
3. When finished, update the same context file and mark that step as done.
4. Keep file edits minimal and limited to completion updates for that step.
